zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes De Solney於1325年出生在英國德比夏爾牛頓 索爾尼時，她的父親Sir Alfred Sulney15歲，母親Margaret De Trussell20歲。她於1351年與Edmund De Appleby II在英國英格蘭德比夏爾德比結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1378年在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes De Solney于1325年出生在英国德比夏爾牛頓 索爾尼时，她的父亲Sir Alfred Sulney15岁，母亲Margaret De Trussell20岁。她于1351年与Edmund De Appleby II在英国英格兰德比夏爾德比结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1378年在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Solney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Polish Dolny: from the adjective dolny ‘lower’, applied as a topographic name for someone who lived in the lower part of a settlement.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes De Solney was born in 1325, in Newton Solney, Derbyshire, England, her father, Sir Alfred Sulney, was 15 and her mother, Margaret De Trussell, was 20. She married Edmund De Appleby II in 1351, in Derby, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 7 daughters. She died in 1378, in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes De Solney est née en 1325, à Newton Solney, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Alfred Sulney, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Margaret De Trussell, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Edmund De Appleby II en 1351, à Derby, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée en 1378, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes De Solney 1325 in Newton Solney, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Alfred Sulney 15 und ihre Mutter Margaret De Trussell 20. Sie hat 1351 in Derby, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Edmund De Appleby II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 7 Töchter. ja.lifeSummary: Agnes De Solneyが1325年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアニュートン ソルニーで生まれた時，父Sir Alfred Sulneyは15歳，母Margaret De Trussellは20歳であった。1351年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアデルビーでEdmund De Appleby IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1378年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes De Solney(이)가 1325년 영국 더비실르 뉴턴 솔니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Alfred Sulney(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret De Trussell(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1351년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 더비에서 Edmund De Appleby II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1378년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes De Solney родилась в 1325 г. в местности нютон солни, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Alfred Sulney было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret De Trussell, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edmund De Appleby II в 1351 г. в местности дирби, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла в 1378 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет.
